examples: It was also - as the site says, balefully glaring at me - an experiment to see how much of this stuff would work for me.
Gone are the days when dining in Prague meant gawping balefully at plates of stodgy dumplings.
Manuel stared balefully at us from his perch in the kitchen, saying nothing.
But one of them has done more than silently worry and gaze balefully at his bank statement -- he has set up a business to tackle the issue for others.
